text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond tries to make herself stronger,
but it disrupts her form and her times drop.
There's not much time left till her next race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She decides to go back to running how she used
to, but it doesn't seem to help. She realizes that
she's losing her running style.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I talk it over with Kitasan Black, and she agrees to
run with Satono Diamond. However, Satono still
can't get back to running the way she used to.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After their training, Kitasan Black suddenly takes
Satono Diamond's hand and runs off with her. The
two of them run to many different places.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond remembers how it felt when she
used to run single-mindedly after Kitasan Black.
Before she knows it, she's back to running like her
old self again.
